sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Atalanta are in strong form with 3 consecutive wins and an unbeaten run of 6 matches, scoring consistently in their last 5 games (11 goals). Parma, however, are struggling with no wins in their last 4 matches, managing only 4 goals in their last 5 games. This suggests a significant disparity in attacking momentum.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, Atalanta have dominated with a 3-1 win in November 2024, although Parma surprisingly won 4-1 in August 2024. Historically, matches between these teams tend to see over 2.5 goals (8/8) and both teams scoring (4/5), indicating high-scoring encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Atalanta rank 3rd in the league with 76 goals scored (2nd highest), showcasing their attacking prowess, while Parma sit 16th with 41 goals and a weaker defense conceding 56. Atalanta's superior ball possession (55.35%) and big chances created (118) further underline their dominance over Parma's less effective stats.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Atalanta's forwards like Mateo Retegui (25 goals) and Ademola Lookman (15 goals) are in fine form, posing a major threat. Parma are missing key midfielder Dennis Man (4 goals, 4 assists), which could hinder their attack. Atalanta's depth and form give them a clear edge.
